results.rendered_html: saptamī f. (of saptama above) the 7th Tithi or lunar day of the fortnight (on which day in the light fortnight there is a festival in honour of the 7th digit, of the moon; often ifc. See gaṅgā-s˚, jayantīs˚),  ŚrS. ;  MBh. ;  VarBṛS.  &c.
